TileType.note: NONE + T01..T20 all present in TileGrid.ts enum; TILE_TYPE_MAP in LevelLoader.ts maps all 20 named types.

ObstacleKind.handled_in: ObstacleManager.ts (weed, wooden_crate, water_current, ice_block, chain_lock, portal, single_path_corridor, spreading_obstacle)

fixes_applied.description: Added _grid internal field + setGrid(grid) method so callers can bind a TileGrid once rather than passing it on every call.
fixes_applied.rationale: GameScene calls new ObstacleManager() with no args; setGrid() enables subsequent no-arg calls.

fixes_applied.description: Added updateWaterCurrent(dt) alias for update(dt). GameScene.update() calls this alias.
fixes_applied.rationale: GameScene.ts called obstacleManager.updateWaterCurrent() which did not exist; method was named update().

fixes_applied.description: Refactored onTileMatched() to accept Point | Point[] as first param, with optional isDirectMatch (default true) and optional grid (falls back to _grid). Old explicit (pos, isDirectMatch, grid) form still works.
fixes_applied.rationale: GameScene passed matchedPositions (Point[]) to onTileMatched() but the original signature expected a single Point with required isDirectMatch and grid args.

fixes_applied.description: Made grid param optional in tickSpread() and isBoardOverrun(); both fall back to internal _grid.
fixes_applied.rationale: GameScene now calls tickSpread() and isBoardOverrun() without arguments using the bound grid.
GameScene called boardEventManager.setGrid() which did not exist.

fixes_applied.description: Added initFromLevelConfig(levelEvents: BoardEvent[] | string[]) method that converts string[] (old level-data format) to BoardEvent[] then delegates to loadEvents().
fixes_applied.rationale: GameScene called boardEventManager.initFromLevelConfig(config.board_events) but the method did not exist. LevelConfig.board_events is typed as string[] in LevelLoader.ts.

fixes_applied.description: Added setBoardRotateWarningCallback(cb) to register a HUD warning callback; callback fires alongside the existing grid.emit('boardRotateWarning') in onMoveMade().
fixes_applied.rationale: The checklist requires board_rotate warning to show a visual warning on GameHUD; the TileGrid event alone cannot reach the HUD directly.

fixes_applied.description: Made grid params optional in onMoveMade(), onMatchComplete(), and update(), all falling back to internal _grid.
fixes_applied.rationale: GameScene now calls these methods without passing grid (setGrid() was called at init time).

fixes_applied.description: Fixed ObstacleManager construction from new ObstacleManager(this._tileGrid) to new ObstacleManager() + setGrid(); added loadObstacles() call to load config.obstacles on level start.
fixes_applied.rationale: ObstacleManager has no constructor params; obstacles were never loaded from level config.

fixes_applied.description: Added boardEventManager.setChapter(this.chapterId) in start() to gate chapter-5 events correctly.
fixes_applied.rationale: BoardEventManager.isEventActive() checks chapter_unlock <= currentChapter; without setChapter(), currentChapter remained 1 and all ch5+ events were blocked.

fixes_applied.description: Added boardEventManager.update(dt) to the GameScene.update() frame loop.
fixes_applied.rationale: water_flow periodic shifts and vine_spread ticks require per-frame dt; without this call they were never processed.

fixes_applied.description: Added boardEventManager.onMoveMade() and boardEventManager.onMatchComplete() calls inside tryMatch() after every successful match. Removed invalid boardEventManager.triggerEventNow('tile_gravity') call (method does not exist; gravity is handled by tileGrid.applyGravity()).
fixes_applied.rationale: board_rotate warning threshold was never checked; tile_fall/tile_slide/freeze_zone events were never processed.

fixes_applied.description: Added tickSpread() + isBoardOverrun() check in tryMatch(); if overrun, calls session.failNow().
fixes_applied.rationale: Spreading obstacle overrun game-over condition was wired in ObstacleManager but never checked or connected to the session failure path.

fixes_applied.description: Added playSFX(SFXKey.LEVEL_COMPLETE) in _onSessionEnded(). Added failNow() public method to GameSession for board-overrun failures (including levels with no move limit where the move-drain path would not trigger failure).
fixes_applied.rationale: LEVEL_COMPLETE SFX was missing from the session-end trigger point. Board overrun on no-move-limit levels required a new failure path that does not depend on move count.

unresolved.description: BoardEventManager is typed as @property(BoardEventManager) in GameScene but it is a plain TypeScript class (no @ccclass/@Component decorator). In Cocos Creator, @property inspector wiring only works for Component subclasses. At runtime the inspector reference will be null unless BoardEventManager is promoted to a Component or the reference is obtained programmatically. This is an editor/runtime concern, not a TypeScript compile issue.
unresolved.impact: boardEventManager will be null in the editor unless wired via code instead of the inspector.
unresolved.suggested_fix: Either extend BoardEventManager from Component and add @ccclass, or remove the @property and construct it programmatically in GameScene.start() like ObstacleManager.

unresolved.description: LevelConfig.board_events is typed as string[] in LevelLoader.ts but BoardEventManager.loadEvents() expects BoardEvent[]. The initFromLevelConfig() shim converts string[] → BoardEvent[] with chapter_unlock=1 and empty config, which is sufficient for simple event names (tile_gravity, water_flow) but loses per-event config data (intervals, rotate thresholds, etc.).
unresolved.impact: Level JSON files with rich board_events config (BoardEvent[] shape) would need LevelConfig.board_events to be typed as BoardEvent[] | string[] for full fidelity.
unresolved.suggested_fix: Update LevelLoader.ts LevelConfig.board_events type to BoardEvent[] | string[] and ensure level-design.json uses the structured form.
